$comment: Reference manifest for the per-item `searchTerms` field. Two example items (one sofa with broad EN+TR coverage, one candle with mixed single-word and multi-word terms) show the intended authoring shape. The two referenced categories (sofas, candles) are included so the manifest is self-contained and seedable on its own. Run validation through `ObjectInspirationSeedInputSchema.parse(...)` before publishing — bounds: max 10 terms/lang, each term trim().min(1).max(40), language keys may be any of the 32 supported locales, each independently optional. Empty/absent searchTerms is the backward-compat fallback (matcher falls back to title-only). See docs/brainstorms/2026-05-26-object-inspiration-search-terms-requirements.md §6 for the full schema decisions.

items.prompt: A modern fabric sofa with clean lines and minimalist silhouette
A candle with a clearly twisted body form, sculptural wax shape, and a decorative silhouette
